title: 2-step subtraction word problems within 100
description: Practice solving 2-step subtraction word problems. Numbers used are 100 or less.
topic_path: Get ready for patterns and problem solving

assessment_items.question_content:
Grandpa made $60$ cookies. His grandkids ate $36$ of the cookies. Grandma ate $18$ cookies.

**How many cookies are left?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] cookies
hints:
Grandpa baked $\purpleD{60}$ cookies. His grandkids ate $\blueE{36}$ cookies.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4de1cd6c0fe1fc886904cabc464b80e422b26df7)

$\purpleD{60}-\blueE{36}=\maroonD{24}$

There were $\maroonD{24}$ cookies left.

Grandma ate $\tealE{18}$ cookies.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4e3889608a1f3b5fae323f95b7c1a758bbdfe636)

$\maroonD{24}-\tealE{18}=\goldE{6}$
There are $\goldE{6}$ cookies left.

assessment_items.question_content:
A pet rescue has $87$ animals. $41$ of the animals are dogs and $32$ are cats. The rest of the animals are rabbits.

**How many rabbits does the pet rescue have?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] rabbits
hints:
The pet rescue has $\purpleD{87}$ animals. $\blueE{41}$ animals were dogs.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4083f24e8071eb1a5ea48b5e8fc6c0282c256368)

$\purpleD{87}-\blueE{41}=\maroonD{46}$

There are $\maroonD{46}$ cats and rabbits.

$\tealE{32}$ of the animals were cats.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/77cf6f461c167be76c264d9c5618f52296a9d01a)

$\maroonD{46}-\tealE{32}=\goldE{14}$
There were $\goldE{14}$ rabbits.

assessment_items.question_content:
Manny is selling lemonade.  She has prepared $48$ cups of lemonade.   At lunch time, she sells $22$ cups of lemonade.  At dinner time, Manny sells $14$ cups of lemonade.    

**How many cups of lemonade does Manny have left?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] cups
hints:
Manny has $48$ cups of lemonade and she sells $22$ cups of lemonade.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4a4d18dea9dd0c8ed7cc9d8c4024a4a53f227b79)

$\purpleD{48}-\blueE{22}=\maroonD{26}$

Manny has $\maroonD{26}$ cups of lemonade left after her lunch sale.

Then, Manny sold $\tealE{14}$ cups of lemonade at dinner time.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0e228046a057f809cb6be068553e75f622a963a3)

$\maroonD{26}-\tealE{14}=\goldE{12}$
Manny has $\goldE{12}$ cups of lemonade left after lunch and dinner.

assessment_items.question_content:
A train traveling through Japan has $90$ passengers.   

$52$ passengers get off in Tokyo.  In Kobe, another $29$ passengers get off the train.  No new passengers get on the train.

**How many passengers are still on the train?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] passengers
hints:
The train started with $90$ passengers and then $52$ got off in Tokyo.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2169b2fae1688a329a354fb3dbcbcc6ecac5162b)

$\purpleD{90}-\blueE{52}=\maroonD{38}$

The train had $\maroonD{38}$ passengers left after they left Tokyo.

Then, another $\tealE{29}$ passengers got off at Kobe.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3def42dccc4b72c0fcd0c005052f1b52a5426c8b)

$\maroonD{38}-\tealE{29}=\goldE{9}$
The train had $\goldE{9}$ passengers still on the train.

assessment_items.question_content:
A nature center has $13$ monkeys playing in it.  $5$ monkeys are on the low tree branches.  One more monkey is swinging on a tire swing.   The rest of the monkeys are in the leafy treetop. 

**How many monkeys are in the treetop?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] monkeys
hints:
A nature center has $\purpleD{13}$ monkeys. $\blueE5$ monkeys are on the low tree branches.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dc5b8833111493eec310d6e9b0b070a41edb089f)

$\purpleD{13}-\blueE{5}=\maroonD{8}$

There were $\maroonD{8}$ monkey's left.

$\tealE{1}$ monkey was swinging on a tire swing.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/de09d4fd4ec14b57ee70f08adda3c04048c4de56)

$\maroonD{8}-\tealE{1}=\goldE{7}$
There are $\goldE{7}$ monkeys in the leafy treetop.

assessment_items.question_content:
A sea turtle laid $39$ eggs on the beach.  $11$ eggs hatched on a Monday.  $6$ eggs hatched on a Tuesday.  The rest of the eggs hatched on a Wednesday.

**How many sea turtle eggs hatched on Wednesday?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] eggs
hints:
A sea turtle laid $\purpleD{39}$ eggs. $\blueE{11}$ eggs hatched on a Monday.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b48a3211142d78c4d8e0b824419b741b11730909)

$\purpleD{39}-\blueE{11}=\maroonD{28}$

There were $\maroonD{28}$ eggs left.

$\tealE{6}$ eggs hatched on a Tuesday.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5042ea14dad43cd0fdb3b09b5659a9548b51d6b1)

$\maroonD{28}-\tealE{6}=\goldE{22}$
$\goldE{22}$ sea turtle eggs hatched on a Wednesday.

assessment_items.question_content:
There were $96$ books for sale at a garage sale.  Arnold bought $32$ books.  Later, Mel bought $31$ books.  

**How many books are left at the garage sale?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] books
hints:
There were $\purpleD{96}$ books at the sale.  Arnold bought $\blueE{32}$ books.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/47047c12cb1c5e4f54550e6497281c3a276b39f3)

$\purpleD{96}-\blueE{32}=\maroonD{64}$

There were $\maroonD{64}$ books left after Arnold bought some.

Mel bought $\tealE{31}$ books.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/40a05c1d21ea39ed438c028ebaaffd7449c7f9e2)

$\maroonD{64}-\tealE{31}=\goldE{33}$
There are $\goldE{33}$ books left at the garage sale.

assessment_items.question_content:
Whitney had $84$ fish in her fish tank. She gave $14$ fish to her friend Max.  Then, she moved $29$ fish to another tank.

**How many fish are still in the first fish tank?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] fish
hints:
There were $\purpleD{84}$ fish in Whitney's fish tank.  She gave $\blueE{14}$ fish to her friend.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e421942e86a74eb8a8a430c4aa5909b43b15466c)

$\purpleD{84}-\blueE{14}=\maroonD{70}$

There were $\maroonD{70}$ fish left.

Whitney also moved $\tealE{29}$ fish.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0703fd07a263a5c15ec25d0f4da20d197d86f0b2)

$\maroonD{70}-\tealE{29}=\goldE{41}$
Whitney has $\goldE{41}$ fish left in her fish tank.

assessment_items.question_content:
Teo had $\$62$ in his piggy bank. He took out $\$17$ to buy a stuffed animal. Then, he gave $\$18$ to his brother for his birthday. 

**How much money does Teo have left in his piggy bank?**  

$\$$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
Teo had $\$\purpleD{62}$ in his piggy bank. He paid $\$\blueE{17}$ for a stuffed animal.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/18f6d089c94819250a54d747d69c07209babae4c)

$\$\purpleD{62}-\$\blueE{17}=\$\maroonD{45}$

There were $\$\maroonD{45}$ left after buying the stuffed animal.

Teo gave his brother $\$\tealE{18}$ for his birthday.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8326b5b7e96ea10ea45957d22775dd8faf7ad0c0)

$\$\maroonD{45}-\$\tealE{18}=\$\goldE{27}$
Teo has $\$\goldE{27}$ left in his piggy bank,

assessment_items.question_content:
There are $53$ cars parked at the movie theatre. $29$ cars drove away after the first movie. $7$ cars drove away after the second movie. 

**How many cars are still in the parking lot after the second movie?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] cars
hints:
There are $\purpleD{53}$ cars in the parking lot. $\blueE{29}$ cars left after the first movie. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d031e8949dbae322a598704c5ba20c332a70e480)

$\purpleD{53}-\blueE{29}=\maroonD{24}$

There were $\maroonD{24}$ cars left after the first movie.

Then $\tealE{7}$ cars left after the second movie.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7d62da835376b521cb018d4e672420c3cd821ae6)

$\maroonD{24}-\tealE{7}=\goldE{17}$
The parking lot has $\goldE{17}$ cars left.

assessment_items.question_content:
Mr. Loy fixes bikes for a living. This month, he plans to fix $74$ bikes. So far, he has fixed $14$ kids' bikes and $25$ adults' bikes.

**How many bikes does Mr. Loy still have to fix?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] bikes
hints:
Mr. Loy had  to fix $\purpleD{74}$ bikes. He fixed $\blueE{14}$ kids'  bikes.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cedb6d4fc433072f343bd857169e0922022524c5)

$\purpleD{74}-\blueE{14}=\maroonD{60}$

There were $\maroonD{60}$ bikes left to fix after Mr. Loy fixed the kids' bikes.

Then Mr. Loy fixed $\tealE{25}$ adult bikes.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/498161217ba9c708c622be6049a897e5ea0e0454)

$\maroonD{60}-\tealE{25}=\goldE{35}$
Mr. Loy has $\goldE{35}$ bikes left to fix.

assessment_items.question_content:
Ming had $59$ birthday cupcakes.  He gave $30$ cupcakes to his classmates at school.  Ming's family ate another $11$ cupcakes at home.   

**How many cupcakes does Ming have left?**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] cupcakes
hints:
Ming had $59$ cupcakes and he gave $30$ cupcakes to his classmates at school.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/21549611faf2a4d0ba22247b1ed2444a6aacb326)

$\purpleD{59}-\blueE{30}=\maroonD{29}$

Ming had $\maroonD{29}$ cupcakes left after giving some to his classmates.

Then, his family ate $\tealE{11}$ cupcakes.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9286f43a7c33e31f857b70a06b6933d2ff5e53af)

$\maroonD{29}-\tealE{11}=\goldE{18}$
Ming has $\goldE{18}$ cupcakes left.
